name: CHECKROWUSETDREF
definition:
CREATE TRIGGER [dbo].[CHECKROWUSETDREF] ON [dbo].[TALEPHAREKETLERI]
AFTER DELETE 
AS 
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;     
	IF EXISTS ( SELECT * FROM STOKHAREKETLERI WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE TD_REF>0 AND TD_REF IN (SELECT TD_REF FROM deleted))
	begin rollback transaction RAISERROR ('TD_REF in use.' , 16, 1) end
END
